message:
fix: agent-booster file argument mode

🐛 Bug Fix: File arguments now work correctly

Previously, using file arguments caused JSON parsing error:
  npx agent-booster apply file.js "edit" → ERROR

Root Cause:
  CLI checked !process.stdin.isTTY before checking args.file,
  causing empty stdin to be parsed as JSON.

Fix:
  Only use JSON stdin mode if no file argument provided:
  if (!process.stdin.isTTY && !args.file) { ... }

Validated:
  ✅ JSON stdin mode: echo '{...}' | npx agent-booster apply
  ✅ File argument mode: npx agent-booster apply file.js "edit"
  ✅ Help flag: npx agent-booster apply --help

Published: agent-booster@0.1.2

🤖 Generated with Claude Code
Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
